CustomField.description: This field captures the Derate value entered during utilization. If no value provided at that time, it defaults to the Derate value defined at the Supplemental Rent/Assembly/Aircraft level.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field captures the Derate value entered during utilization. If no value provided at that time, it defaults to the Derate value defined at the Supplemental Rent/Assembly/Aircraft level.
CustomField.label: Assembly Derate
